name: Herbed French Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 8 ounce loaf French bread, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the oil and garlic to the melted butter; sauté until the garlic is tender.
3. Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the Parmesan cheese, chopped chives, and mustard. Let cool for 5 minutes or until creamy.
4. Spread the mixture on one side of each slice of bread.
5. Place the slices with the buttered side up on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 6-8 minutes or broil for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Yield: 4-6 servings.
